title: PureVanilla
description: The official mod for the PureVanilla server. Easily connect to the server using the best possible ping.
body:
# PureVanilla Server List

PureVanilla Server List is a small client-side Fabric mod that makes joining PureVanilla easier from Minecraft's multiplayer screen.

Instead of manually adding server addresses, the mod adds a PureVanilla panel directly inside the multiplayer server list. From there, you can see the server message, check regional pings, and join through the fastest available route.

## What It Does

![server list](https://i.ibb.co/6Rk9ws27/image.png)

- Adds a PureVanilla featured server panel to the multiplayer server list.
- Shows the current PureVanilla MOTD and online player count.
- Pings available regions and highlights the best one for you.
- Lets you join with one `PLAY` button, using the lowest-ping region when available.
- Shows region names, flags, and ping times without exposing raw server addresses.
- Includes quick links for the PureVanilla Store and Vote pages.
- Shows a Status Page button if the main server status cannot be reached.

## What It Does Not Do

- It does not change gameplay.
- It does not give any in-game advantage.
- It does not join servers automatically.
- It does not replace Minecraft's normal multiplayer screen.

## Requirements

- Minecraft `26.1.2`
- Fabric Loader `0.19.2` or newer
- Java `25` or newer

This is a client-side mod. You only need to install it on your own Minecraft client.

## How To Use It

1. Install Fabric Loader for the supported Minecraft version.
2. Put the mod jar in your Minecraft `mods` folder.
3. Start Minecraft with the Fabric profile.
4. Open `Multiplayer`.
5. Use the PureVanilla panel at the top of the server list.

## Joining PureVanilla

- Click `PLAY` to join using the best detected route.
- Click a region button if you want to choose a specific region manually.
- If PureVanilla cannot be reached, click `Status Page` to check for outages or maintenance.

## Links

- Website: https://purevanilla.co/
- Store: https://purevanilla.co/shop
- Vote: https://purevanilla.co/vote
- Status: https://status.purevanilla.co/
